title: Fix :float on Invoice money fields
prompt: The Invoice schema in test_fixtures/invoice_float_amount.ex has `subtotal`, `tax`, `total`, and `balance` as :float. Fix all of them to :decimal. Also change the `issued_at` field from :naive_datetime to :utc_datetime (the app serves users globally), and update `timestamps()` to use `type: :utc_datetime`. Write the fixed schema to lib/my_app/billing/invoice.ex.
tier_rationale: Multi-field sweep where every money field gets the same fix. Tests that Claude applies the :decimal rule consistently, not just for the first field named 'price'.
research_citation: Ecto Issue #2683 — timestamps naive_datetime default acknowledged as historical accident
